description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean, straight lines and a solid, monolithic appearance. The sofa has two distinct backrest sections, each separated by a narrow vertical gap, and two seat cushions that are similarly divided. The armrests are broad, flat, and extend straight from the backrest to the front, matching the overall geometric style. The upholstery appears to be a uniform, dark color with a matte finish, and there are no visible decorative elements, stitching, or patterns. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, concealing any legs or supports, giving it a grounded and substantial look. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern parks.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with divided back and seat cushions, broad flat armrests, and a solid base in a dark matte finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, straight backrest with a central vertical split and the solid, unbroken base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the sofa's deep seat profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the two separate seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the sofa's overall symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with the same solid base and geometric lines.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two individual back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, separated by a central vertical gap.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, flat, straight armrests at seat height, extending from the backrest to the front with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base is a continuous solid plinth that extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a legless or recessed-leg design.
attribute_backrest_type: Tall, straight, and segmented into two equal sections by a vertical gap, with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
